# Docs Development Instructions

- Treat docs updates as production-quality engineering artifacts.
- Preserve requirement traceability from interview questions to PRDs.
- When adding PRDs, include: overview, goals, scope, functional/non-functional requirements, dependencies, risks/mitigations, acceptance criteria, and source.
- Ensure requirements are testable/reviewable (specific outcomes, measurable criteria, and explicit owners/dependencies where possible).
- Capture open ambiguities as assumptions or open questions instead of guessing hidden stakeholder intent.
